SEARCH
Package com.dua3.utility.fx.controls

Class TextEditorPane

java.lang.Object
javafx.scene.Node
javafx.scene.Parent
javafx.scene.layout.Region
javafx.scene.control.Control
com.dua3.utility.fx.controls.TextPane
com.dua3.utility.fx.controls.TextEditorPane
All Implemented Interfaces:
InputControl<RichText>, RichTextEditorPane, RichTextPane, javafx.css.Styleable, javafx.event.EventTarget, javafx.scene.control.Skinnable
public class TextEditorPane extends TextPane implements InputControl<RichText>, RichTextEditorPane
Text editor control based on TextPane.

This class currently provides a stub editing API surface, modeled after JavaFX TextInputControl, but operating on RichText. Real editing behavior will be added incrementally.

For observing live editor mutations, use documentVersionProperty() and fetch current text via getDocumentText() (for example with Bindings.createObjectBinding(editor::getDocumentText, editor.documentVersionProperty())). TextPane.textProperty() exposes ToRichText snapshots and is updated on each document change.

  • Property Details

    • documentText

      public final javafx.beans.property.ReadOnlyObjectProperty<RichText> documentTextProperty
      Read-only property exposing the materialized editor document snapshot.

      Use documentVersionProperty() as the edit-change signal and getDocumentText() to retrieve the current document text. This snapshot property is not intended as the primary edit notification channel.

      See Also:
      • getDocumentText()
      • documentTextProperty()

    • documentVersion

      public final javafx.beans.property.ReadOnlyLongProperty documentVersionProperty
      Read-only property exposing the document version.

      Use this property as a lightweight invalidation signal for document changes.

      See Also:
      • getDocumentVersion()
      • documentVersionProperty()

    • editable

      public final javafx.beans.property.BooleanProperty editableProperty
      Editable property.
      See Also:
      • isEditable()
      • setEditable(boolean)
      • editableProperty()

    • toolbarLocation

      public final javafx.beans.property.ObjectProperty<DetachableNode.Location> toolbarLocationProperty
      Toolbar visibility property.
      See Also:
      • getToolbarLocation()
      • setToolbarLocation(DetachableNode.Location)
      • toolbarLocationProperty()

    • toolbarApplicationParent

      public final javafx.beans.property.ObjectProperty<@Nullable javafx.scene.Parent> toolbarApplicationParentProperty
      Toolbar application parent property.

      This property controls what parent node to set for the toolbar when the toolbar location is set to DetachableNode.Location.APPLICATION.

      See Also:
      • getToolbarApplicationParent()
      • setToolbarApplicationParent(Parent)
      • toolbarApplicationParentProperty()

    • length

      public final javafx.beans.property.ReadOnlyIntegerProperty lengthProperty
      Read-only document length property.
      See Also:
      • getLength()
      • lengthProperty()

    • selectedText

      Read-only selected-text property.
      See Also:
      • getSelectedText()
      • selectedTextProperty()

    • selection

      public final javafx.beans.property.ReadOnlyObjectProperty<IndexRange> selectionProperty
      Read-only selection range property.
      See Also:
      • getSelection()
      • selectionProperty()

    • anchor

      public final javafx.beans.property.ReadOnlyIntegerProperty anchorProperty
      Read-only anchor property.

      • getAnchor()

    • caretPosition

      public final javafx.beans.property.ReadOnlyIntegerProperty caretPositionProperty
      Read-only caret-position property.
      See Also:
      • getCaretPosition()
      • caretPositionProperty()

    • bold

      Bold toggle property for current formatting state.

      public final javafx.beans.property.StringProperty fontFamilyProperty

      Read-only undo-availability property.

  • Constructor Details

    • TextEditorPane

      public TextEditorPane()
      Creates an empty TextEditorPane.

    • TextEditorPane

      public TextEditorPane(@Nullable CharSequence text)
      Creates a TextEditorPane with initial text.
      Parameters:
      text - initial text

  • Method Details

    • getDocumentText

      public final RichText getDocumentText()
      Returns the current rich-text document.

      This returns the materialized document model. TextPane.textProperty() publishes lazy ToRichText snapshots.

      Returns:
      current document text

    • documentTextProperty

      public final javafx.beans.property.ReadOnlyObjectProperty<RichText> documentTextProperty()
      Read-only property exposing the materialized editor document snapshot.

      Use documentVersionProperty() as the edit-change signal and getDocumentText() to retrieve the current document text. This snapshot property is not intended as the primary edit notification channel.

      Returns:
      read-only document text property
      See Also:
      • getDocumentText()

    • getDocumentVersion

      public final long getDocumentVersion()
      Returns the current document version.

      The value increments whenever the editor document changes.

      Returns:
      document version

    • documentVersionProperty

      public final javafx.beans.property.ReadOnlyLongProperty documentVersionProperty()
      Read-only property exposing the document version.

      Use this property as a lightweight invalidation signal for document changes.

      Returns:
      read-only document version property
      See Also:
      • getDocumentVersion()

    • state

      public InputControlState<RichText> state()
      Returns the input-control state facade.
      Specified by:
      state in interface InputControl<RichText>
      Returns:
      state facade used for validation and commit handling

    • set

      public void set(@Nullable RichText arg)
      Sets the committed value.
      Specified by:
      set in interface InputControl<RichText>
      Parameters:
      arg - new committed value

    • node

      public javafx.scene.Node node()
      Returns this control as a JavaFX node.
      Specified by:
      node in interface InputControl<RichText>
      Returns:
      this instance

    • editableProperty

      public final javafx.beans.property.BooleanProperty editableProperty()
      Editable property.
      Returns:
      editable property
      See Also:
      • isEditable()
      • setEditable(boolean)

    • isEditable

      public final boolean isEditable()
      Indicates whether editing is enabled.
      Returns:
      true if editable

    • isEnterKeyInsertsNewline

      public final boolean isEnterKeyInsertsNewline()
      Description copied from interface: RichTextEditorPane
      Returns whether pressing the ENTER key inserts a newline.
      Specified by:
      isEnterKeyInsertsNewline in interface RichTextEditorPane
      Returns:
      true if ENTER inserts a newline

    • setEnterKeyInsertsNewline

      public final void setEnterKeyInsertsNewline(boolean value)
      Description copied from interface: RichTextEditorPane
      Configures ENTER key behavior.
      Specified by:
      setEnterKeyInsertsNewline in interface RichTextEditorPane
      Parameters:
      value - true if ENTER should insert a newline, false to leave ENTER handling to outer controls

    • setEditable

      public final void setEditable(boolean value)
      Enables or disables editing.
      Parameters:
      value - true to enable editing

    • toolbarLocationProperty

      public final javafx.beans.property.ObjectProperty<DetachableNode.Location> toolbarLocationProperty()
      Toolbar visibility property.
      Returns:
      toolbar visibility property
      See Also:
      • getToolbarLocation()
      • setToolbarLocation(DetachableNode.Location)

    • getToolbarLocation

      public final DetachableNode.Location getToolbarLocation()
      Indicates whether the toolbar should be visible.
      Returns:
      true if toolbar is visible

    • setToolbarLocation

      public final void setToolbarLocation(DetachableNode.Location value)
      Shows or hides the toolbar.
      Parameters:
      value - true to show the toolbar

    • toolbarApplicationParentProperty

      public final javafx.beans.property.ObjectProperty<@Nullable javafx.scene.Parent> toolbarApplicationParentProperty()
      Toolbar application parent property.

      This property controls what parent node to set for the toolbar when the toolbar location is set to DetachableNode.Location.APPLICATION.

      Returns:
      the toolbar application parent property
      See Also:
      • getToolbarApplicationParent()
      • setToolbarApplicationParent(Parent)

    • getToolbarApplicationParent

      public final @Nullable javafx.scene.Parent getToolbarApplicationParent()
      Retrieves the parent component to use as the toolbar's parent when the toolbar location is set to DetachableNode.Location.APPLICATION.
      Returns:
      the Parent object to be set as the toolbar's parent when the location is set to DetachableNode.Location.APPLICATION.

    • setToolbarApplicationParent

      public final void setToolbarApplicationParent(@Nullable javafx.scene.Parent value)
      Sets the parent to show the toolbar in when the location is set to DetachableNode.Location.APPLICATION.
      Parameters:
      value - the Parent object to be set as the toolbar's parent when the location is set to DetachableNode.Location.APPLICATION.

    • getLength

      public final int getLength()
      Returns current document length.
      Returns:
      number of characters

    • lengthProperty

      public final javafx.beans.property.ReadOnlyIntegerProperty lengthProperty()
      Read-only document length property.
      Returns:
      read-only length property
      See Also:
      • getLength()

    • getSelectedText

      public final RichText getSelectedText()
      Returns the currently selected text.
      Returns:
      current selection text

      public final javafx.beans.property.ReadOnlyObjectProperty<RichText> selectedTextProperty()

      Returns:
      selected-text property
      See Also:
      • getSelectedText()

    • getSelection

      public final IndexRange getSelection()
      Returns the current selection range.

      current selection range

      public final boolean isBold()
      Indicates whether bold formatting is active.
      Returns:
      true if bold is active

      public final void setBold(boolean value)
      Sets bold formatting state.
      Parameters:
      value - true to enable bold

      italic property

      Underline toggle property for current formatting state.

      underline property
      See Also:
      • isUnderline()
      • setUnderline(boolean)

    • isUnderline

      public final boolean isUnderline()
      Indicates whether underline formatting is active.
      Returns:
      true if underline is active

    • setUnderline

      public final void setUnderline(boolean value)
      Sets underline formatting state.
      Parameters:
      value - true to enable underline

      See Also:

      public final boolean isStrikeThrough()
      Indicates whether strike-through formatting is active.
      Returns:
      true if strike-through is active

      public final void setStrikeThrough(boolean value)
      Sets strike-through formatting state.
      Parameters:
      value - true to enable strike-through

      public final javafx.beans.property.ObjectProperty<@Nullable Color> textColorProperty()
      Text-color property for current formatting state.
      Returns:
      text-color property
      See Also:
      • getTextColor()
      • setTextColor(Color)

    • getTextColor

      public final @Nullable Color getTextColor()
      Returns current text color setting.
      Returns:
      current text color or null

    • setTextColor

      public final void setTextColor(@Nullable Color value)
      Sets text color for subsequent input or current selection formatting.
      Parameters:
      value - text color, or null

    • backgroundColorProperty

      public final javafx.beans.property.ObjectProperty<@Nullable Color> backgroundColorProperty()
      Background-color property for current formatting state.
      Returns:
      background-color property
      See Also:
      • getBackgroundColor()
      • setBackgroundColor(Color)

    • getBackgroundColor

      public final @Nullable Color getBackgroundColor()
      Returns current text background color setting.
      Returns:
      current background color or null

    • setBackgroundColor

      public final void setBackgroundColor(@Nullable Color value)
      Sets text background color for subsequent input or current selection formatting.
      Parameters:
      value - background color, or null

      Font-family property for current formatting state.
      Returns:
      font-family property
      See Also:
      • getFontFamily()
      • setFontFamily(String)

    • getFontFamily

      public final @Nullable String getFontFamily()
      Returns current font-family setting.
      Returns:
      font family or null

    • setFontFamily

      public final void setFontFamily(@Nullable String value)
      Sets font family for subsequent input or current selection formatting.
      Parameters:
      value - font family or null

    • fontSizeProperty

      public final javafx.beans.property.DoubleProperty fontSizeProperty()
      Font-size property for current formatting state.
      Returns:
      font-size property
      See Also:
      • getFontSize()
      • setFontSize(double)

    • getFontSize

      public final double getFontSize()
      Returns current font-size setting.
      Returns:
      font size in points

    • setFontSize

      public final void setFontSize(double value)
      Sets font size for subsequent input or current selection formatting.
      Parameters:
      value - font size in points

    • isUndoable

      public final boolean isUndoable()
      Indicates whether an undo step is available.
      Returns:
      true if undo is possible

    • undoableProperty

      public final javafx.beans.property.ReadOnlyBooleanProperty undoableProperty()
      Read-only undo-availability property.
      Returns:
      undoable property
      See Also:
      • isUndoable()

    • isRedoable

      public final boolean isRedoable()
      Indicates whether a redo step is available.
      Returns:
      true if redo is possible

      public final javafx.beans.property.ReadOnlyBooleanProperty redoableProperty()
      Read-only redo-availability property.
      Returns:
      redoable property
      See Also:

    • getText

      public RichText getText()
      Description copied from class: TextPane
      Returns the rich text.
      Specified by:
      getText in interface RichTextPane
      Overrides:
      getText in class TextPane
      Returns:
      text

    • getText

      public RichText getText(int start, int end)
      Returns a text slice between two offsets.
      Parameters:
      start - start offset (inclusive)
      end - end offset (exclusive)
      Returns:
      selected text slice

    • lines

      public Stream<RichText> lines()
      Returns a snapshot stream over the current logical lines.

      The returned stream reflects the document state at invocation time. Subsequent edits do not affect the stream contents.

      Returns:
      stream of rich-text lines

    • appendTo

      public void appendTo(Appendable appendable) throws IOException
      Appends the current plain-text document contents to the given appendable.

      This method writes line by line from the editor's logical document representation and avoids building a full-document RichText instance.

      Parameters:
      appendable - target appendable
      Throws:
      IOException - if writing fails

    • appendText

      public void appendText(@Nullable CharSequence text)
      Appends plain text.
      Parameters:
      text - text to append

    • appendText

      public void appendText(@Nullable ToRichText text)
      Appends rich text.
      Parameters:
      text - rich text to append

    • appendText

      public void appendText(@Nullable CharSequence text, Font font)
      Appends text using the provided font.
      Parameters:
      text - text to append
      font - font to apply

    • insertText

      public void insertText(int index, @Nullable CharSequence text)
      Inserts plain text at the given index.
      Parameters:
      index - insertion position
      text - text to insert

    • insertText

      public void insertText(int index, @Nullable CharSequence text, Font font)
      Inserts text with a specific font at the given index.
      Parameters:
      index - insertion position
      text - text to insert
      font - font to apply

    • deletePreviousChar

      public boolean deletePreviousChar()
      Deletes selection or previous character.
      Returns:
      true if text was deleted

    • deleteNextChar

      public boolean deleteNextChar()
      Deletes selection or next character.
      Returns:
      true if text was deleted

    • deleteText

      public void deleteText(IndexRange range)
      Deletes text inside the given range.
      Parameters:
      range - range to delete

    • deleteText

      public void deleteText(javafx.scene.control.IndexRange range)
      Deletes text inside the given JavaFX range.
      Parameters:
      range - JavaFX range to delete

    • deleteText

      public void deleteText(int start, int end)
      Deletes text between offsets.
      Parameters:
      start - start offset (inclusive)
      end - end offset (exclusive)

    • replaceText

      public void replaceText(IndexRange range, @Nullable CharSequence text)
      Replaces the given range with plain text.
      Parameters:
      range - range to replace
      text - replacement text

    • replaceText

      public void replaceText(javafx.scene.control.IndexRange range, @Nullable CharSequence text)
      Replaces the given JavaFX range with plain text.
      Parameters:
      range - JavaFX range
      text - replacement text

    • replaceText

      public void replaceText(IndexRange range, @Nullable CharSequence text, Font font)
      Replaces the given range with text rendered using a font.
      Parameters:
      range - range to replace
      text - replacement text
      font - font to apply

    • replaceText

      public void replaceText(javafx.scene.control.IndexRange range, @Nullable CharSequence text, Font font)
      Replaces the given JavaFX range with text rendered using a font.
      Parameters:
      range - JavaFX range
      text - replacement text
      font - font to apply

    • replaceText

      public void replaceText(int start, int end, @Nullable CharSequence text, Font font)
      Replaces text between offsets with text rendered using a font.
      Parameters:
      start - start offset (inclusive)
      end - end offset (exclusive)
      text - replacement text
      font - font to apply

    • replaceText

      public void replaceText(int start, int end, @Nullable CharSequence replacement)
      Replaces text between offsets with plain text.
      Parameters:
      start - start offset (inclusive)
      end - end offset (exclusive)
      replacement - replacement text

    • replaceSelection

      public void replaceSelection(@Nullable CharSequence replacement)
      Replaces the current selection.
      Parameters:
      replacement - replacement text

    • selectRange

      public void selectRange(int anchor, int caretPosition)
      Sets selection anchor and caret.
      Parameters:
      anchor - anchor position
      caretPosition - caret position

    • selectRange

      public void selectRange(javafx.scene.control.IndexRange range)
      Selects the given JavaFX range.
      Parameters:
      range - JavaFX range

    • selectAll

      public void selectAll()
      Selects the full document.

    • deselect

      public void deselect()
      Clears the current selection.

    • clear

      public void clear()
      Removes all text.

    • positionCaret

      public void positionCaret(int pos)
      Moves caret to a position and clears selection.
      Parameters:
      pos - target caret position

    • selectPositionCaret

      public void selectPositionCaret(int pos)
      Moves caret while keeping current anchor.
      Parameters:
      pos - new caret position

    • home

      public void home()
      Moves caret to document start.

    • end

      public void end()
      Moves caret to document end.

    • forward

      public void forward()
      Moves caret one character forward.

    • backward

      public void backward()
      Moves caret one character backward.

    • previousWord

      public void previousWord()
      Moves caret to start of previous word.

    • nextWord

      public void nextWord()
      Moves caret to start of next word.

    • endOfNextWord

      public void endOfNextWord()
      Moves caret to end of next word.

    • selectBackward

      public void selectBackward()
      Extends selection one character backward.

    • selectForward

      public void selectForward()
      Extends selection one character forward.

    • selectPreviousWord

      public void selectPreviousWord()
      Extends selection to start of previous word.

    • selectNextWord

      public void selectNextWord()
      Extends selection to start of next word.

    • selectEndOfNextWord

      public void selectEndOfNextWord()
      Extends selection to end of next word.

    • selectHome

      public void selectHome()
      Extends selection to document start.

    • selectEnd

      public void selectEnd()
      Extends selection to document end.

    • copy

      public void copy()
      Copies selection to clipboard.

    • cut

      public void cut()
      Cuts selection to clipboard.

    • paste

      public void paste()
      Pastes clipboard text at selection.

    • undo

      public void undo()
      Performs one undo step.

    • redo

      public void redo()
      Performs one redo step.

    • apply

      public void apply(Style style)
      Applies a style to the current selection.
      Parameters:
      style - style to apply

    • setStyle

      public void setStyle(Style style, boolean enabled)
      Enables or disables a style on the current selection.
      Parameters:
      style - style to toggle
      enabled - true to apply, false to remove

    • remove

      public void remove(Style style)
      Removes a style from the current selection.
      Parameters:
      style - style to remove

    • markBold

      public void markBold(boolean enabled)
      Sets bold formatting on current selection.
      Parameters:
      enabled - true for bold, false for normal weight

    • markItalic

      public void markItalic(boolean enabled)
      Sets italic formatting on current selection.
      Parameters:
      enabled - true for italic, false for normal style

    • markUnderline

      public void markUnderline(boolean enabled)
      Sets underline formatting on current selection.
      Parameters:
      enabled - true to underline, false to remove underline

    • markStrikeThrough

      public void markStrikeThrough(boolean enabled)
      Sets strike-through formatting on current selection.
      Parameters:
      enabled - true to strike through, false to remove

    • cancelEdit

      public void cancelEdit()
      Restores the last committed value and validates the control state.

    • commitValue

      public void commitValue()
      Commits the current text value and validates the control state.
